name: Sour Cream Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and chopped raisins.
2. Add the sour cream, eggs, and melted shortening to the dry ingredients.
3. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Sift together the cake flour, baking soda, and baking powder, then add them to the mixture with the sour cream mixture.
5. Stir in the chopped nuts.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F for about 10 minutes.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
